title: Active Management and Performance Measurement: The Treynor measure evaluates portfolio performance based on total risk...
summary: Distinguish the Treynor measure from the Sharpe ratio by its use of beta.
prompt: The Treynor measure evaluates portfolio performance based on total risk rather than systematic risk.
solution: The Treynor measure specifically assesses performance in relation to systematic risk (beta), not total risk, making it distinct from the Sharpe ratio.
